# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  # Restrict variable expansion to prevent injection
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  GIT_DEPTH: "10"
  # Disable features that could be exploited
  FF_SCRIPT_SECTIONS: "true"
  # Prevent secrets from being exposed in logs
  GIT_CLEAN_FLAGS: "-ffdx"

default:
  tags:
    - shared
  # Set timeout to prevent resource abuse
  timeout: 30 minutes
  # Run in isolated environment
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    # Validate that build scripts exist and are regular files
    - |
      validate_script() {
        local script_path="$1"
        if [ ! -f "$script_path" ]; then
          echo "ERROR: Build script '$script_path' not found"
          exit 1
        fi
        if [ -L "$script_path" ]; then
          echo "ERROR: Symlinks are not allowed for build scripts"
          exit 1
        fi
        # Prevent path traversal
        real_path=$(realpath "$script_path")
        repo_root=$(realpath "$CI_PROJECT_DIR")
        case "$real_path" in
          "$repo_root"/*)
            echo "Script path validated: $real_path"
            ;;
          *)
            echo "ERROR: Script path traversal detected"
            exit 1
        esac
        # Check for dangerous patterns in scripts
        if grep -qEi '(curl|wget|nc|ncat)\s+.*\|.*sh' "$script_path"; then
          echo "ERROR: Remote code execution patterns detected in script"
          exit 1
        fi
        if grep -qEi 'CI_JOB_TOKEN|CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD|PRIVATE_TOKEN|SECRET' "$script_path"; then
          echo "WARNING: Script references sensitive variables - review required"
        fi
      }
    # Drop unnecessary capabilities and set secure umask
    - umask 077
    # Ensure we are in the project directory
    - cd "$CI_PROJECT_DIR"

stages:
  - validate
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

# Gate: validate build configuration before execution
validate:
  stage: validate
  script:
    - |
      # Only allow build scripts from designated directory
      ALLOWED_SCRIPT_DIR="$CI_PROJECT_DIR/.ci/scripts"
      if [ ! -d "$ALLOWED_SCRIPT_DIR" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Build scripts directory '.ci/scripts/' not found"
        echo "Place your custom build scripts in .ci/scripts/"
        exit 1
      fi
      # Validate all scripts in the directory
      find "$ALLOWED_SCRIPT_DIR" -type f -name "*.sh" | while read -r script; do
        echo "Validating: $script"
        # Check script does not modify CI/CD configuration
        if grep -qEi '\.gitlab-ci\.yml|CI_CONFIG_PATH' "$script"; then
          echo "ERROR: Scripts must not modify CI/CD configuration"
          exit 1
        fi
        # Block attempts to exfiltrate data
        if grep -qEi 'curl.*-d.*CI_|wget.*--post-data.*CI_' "$script"; then
          echo "ERROR: Data exfiltration pattern detected"
          exit 1
        fi
        # Ensure no attempts to access Docker socket
        if grep -qi 'docker\.sock\|/var/run/docker' "$script"; then
          echo "ERROR: Docker socket access is not permitted"
          exit 1
        fi
        # Shellcheck if available
        if command -v shellcheck >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          shellcheck -S warning "$script" || true
        fi
      done
      echo "All build scripts validated successfully"
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG

build:
  stage: build
  needs: ["validate"]
  script:
    - |
      BUILD_SCRIPT="$CI_PROJECT_DIR/.ci/scripts/build.sh"
      validate_script "$BUILD_SCRIPT"
      chmod 500 "$BUILD_SCRIPT"
      # Execute in a restricted subshell
      # Unset sensitive CI/CD variables before running user script
      (
        unset CI_JOB_TOKEN
        unset CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD
        unset CI_DEPLOY_PASSWORD
        unset GITLAB_TOKEN
        unset CI_BUILD_TOKEN
        /bin/sh "$BUILD_SCRIPT"
      )
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
    expire_in: 1 hour
    # Prevent artifact from being too large
    when: on_success
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "external_pull_request_event"
      when: never
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "chat"
      when: never

test:
  stage: test
  needs: ["build"]
  script:
    - |
      TEST_SCRIPT="$CI_PROJECT_DIR/.ci/scripts/test.sh"
      validate_script "$TEST_SCRIPT"
      chmod 500 "$TEST_SCRIPT"
      (
        unset CI_JOB_TOKEN
        unset CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD
        unset CI_DEPLOY_PASSWORD
        unset GITLAB_TOKEN
        unset CI_BUILD_TOKEN
        /bin/sh "$TEST_SCRIPT"
      )
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - reports/
    reports:
      junit: reports/junit.xml
    expire_in: 1 hour
    when: always
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  needs: ["test"]
  script:
    - |
      DEPLOY_SCRIPT="$CI_PROJECT_DIR/.ci/scripts/deploy.sh"
      validate_script "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
      chmod 500 "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
      (
        unset CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD
        unset GITLAB_TOKEN
        /bin/sh "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
      )
  environment:
    name: $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG
    on_stop: stop_deploy
  rules:
    # Only deploy from protected branches - prevents fork-based attacks
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      when: manual
      allow_failure: false
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG =~ /^v\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/
      when: manual
      allow_failure: false

stop_deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - |
      TEARDOWN_SCRIPT="$CI_PROJECT_DIR/.ci/scripts/teardown.sh"
      if [ -f "$TEARDOWN_SCRIPT" ]; then
        validate_script "$TEARDOWN_SCRIPT"
        chmod 500 "$TEARDOWN_SCRIPT"
        (
          unset CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD
          unset GITLAB_TOKEN
          /bin/sh "$TEARDOWN_SCRIPT"
        )
      else
        echo "No teardown script found, skipping"
      fi
  environment:
    name: $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG
    action: stop
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      when: manual
      allow_failure: true
